control_awareness: The amount-based approval control requires department head approval for amounts >= 1,000,000. Segregation of duties prevents requester self-approval. Pre-PO approval is required before purchase order issuance.
expected_control_effect: The purchase request will be routed for department head approval before purchase order issuance, ensuring compliance with approval and segregation of duties controls.
overall_reason: Given the amount and scenario, the straightforward approach is to create a single purchase request for the full amount with normal routing, ensuring compliance with approval controls and avoiding unnecessary complexity or delays.
reason: The purchase amount exceeds the manager-level approval threshold, so it requires department head approval. Creating one purchase request for the full amount is straightforward and auditable, meeting the objective to reduce avoidable approval lead time and to comply with all controls.
